## 🎯 Executive Summary

### Top 3 Highest-ROI Tasks (Do These First)

| Rank | Task | Why | Effort | Impact |
|------|------|-----|--------|--------|
| **#1** | Run RAG seeding for all authors | Only 5.3% RAG coverage — chatbot Marcela can't answer questions about 95% of authors | XS | 🔥 Critical |
| **#2** | Run auto-tagging for all authors | 90.4% untagged — interest scoring and semantic features are broken | XS | 🔥 Critical |
| **#3** | Migrate authorAliases.ts to DB | 236-line hardcoded file blocks deduplication and proper author merging | M | High |

### Quick Wins Batch (Can complete in one session)
Tasks P0-1, P0-2, P0-3, P1-9 — all are admin button clicks, no code changes.

## P0 — Critical / Blocking Issues

> These tasks are preventing core features from working correctly.

### P0-1: Run RAG Seeding for All Authors ⚡ USER ACTION REQUIRED
**Description:** Execute "Seed All Authors for RAG" + "Generate N Pending" admin buttons to populate RAG pipeline for all 187 authors (currently only 10/187 = 5.3% coverage).  
**Effort:** XS (5 min)  
**Files:** None (admin UI action)  
**Location:** Admin → Intelligence Dashboard → RAG Pipeline section  
**Blocked By:** None  
**User Action:** Click "Seed All Authors for RAG" then "Generate 50 Pending" repeatedly until queue empty  

---

### P0-2: Run Auto-Tagging for All Authors ⚡ USER ACTION REQUIRED
**Description:** Execute "Auto-Tag All Authors" admin button to tag 169/187 untagged authors. Tags feed interest scoring and semantic clustering.  
**Effort:** XS (5 min)  
**Files:** None (admin UI action)  
**Location:** Admin → Intelligence Dashboard → Tagging section  
**Blocked By:** P0-1 (RAG data improves tag quality)  
**User Action:** Click "Auto-Tag All Authors" button  

---

### P0-3: Re-Run Interest Scoring After Tagging ⚡ USER ACTION REQUIRED
**Description:** Execute "Score All Authors" after P0-2 completes. Current scores are based on minimal tag data.  
**Effort:** XS (5 min)  
**Files:** None (admin UI action)  
**Location:** Admin → Intelligence Dashboard → Scoring section  
**Blocked By:** P0-2  
**User Action:** Click "Score All Authors" button  

---

### P0-4: Migrate authorAliases.ts to Database
**Description:** Move 236-line hardcoded `authorAliases.ts` to `authorProfiles.aliases` JSON column. This blocks proper author deduplication and merge operations.  
**Effort:** M (2-3 hours)  
**Files to Modify:**
- `src/server/data/authorAliases.ts` (delete after migration)
- `src/server/db/schema/authorProfiles.ts` (add aliases column if missing)
- `src/server/services/authorMatcher.service.ts` (update to query DB)
- `src/server/routers/adminMigration.router.ts` (add migration procedure)
- Any files importing `authorAliases.ts` (update imports)  
**Blocked By:** None  
**Batch With:** P1-1, P1-2 (data migration theme)

---

### P0-5: Move Leaderboard Computation to Server Side
**Description:** Leaderboard currently imports hardcoded `libraryData.ts`. Move to tRPC query that computes stats from actual DB records.  
**Effort:** M (2-3 hours)  
**Files to Modify:**
- `src/components/Leaderboard.tsx` (replace imports with tRPC query)
- `src/server/routers/stats.router.ts` (add `getLeaderboardStats` procedure)
- `src/server/data/libraryData.ts` (remove leaderboard data after migration)  
**Blocked By:** None  
**Batch With:** P2-10 (libraryData.ts elimination theme)

```

P0-3 (re-score) ← P0-2 (auto-tagging)

P3-5 (S3 migration service) ← P3-4 (audit)
P3-6 (S3 migration UI) ← P3-5 (service)
P3-2 (sparse vectors) ← P1-7 (basic hybrid)
P2-10 (reduce libraryData deps) ← P0-5 (leaderboard migration)
```

## ✅ Verification Checklist

After completing P0 tasks, verify:
- [ ] RAG coverage > 90% (check Admin → Intelligence → RAG Pipeline)
- [ ] Tagged authors > 90% (check Admin → Intelligence → Tagging)
- [ ] Interest scores recalculated (check author profiles)
- [ ] Pinecone vectors > 2,000 (should roughly double from 1,160)
